title: huertea putumayensis
intro: Huertea putumayensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Grossulariaceae, is also known as the Putumayo hawthorn or Andean hawthorn. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Andean region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Huertea putumayensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Huertea putumayensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements and tinctures.
